description_long: This is a rectangular wooden dining table accompanied by six matching chairs, three on each of the longer sides. The table and chairs are constructed from dark-stained wood, with the tabletop featuring visible wood grain and plank-style construction. The chairs have vertical slatted backs and lightly cushioned seats, providing both support and comfort. The legs of both the table and chairs are turned, giving a classic, slightly rustic appearance. The set is robust and designed for communal dining, suitable for gatherings or family meals. The overall aesthetic is traditional, with a focus on durability and timeless style.
description: A dark wooden rectangular dining table with six matching slatted-back chairs, featuring turned legs and a classic, rustic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the table with three chairs on each side and the detailed turned legs.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the narrow side of the table and the single chair at the head, with the plank tabletop visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite side with three chairs and the table's length.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, similar to view 1, showing the other head chair and the wood grain of the tabletop.
